title: A new record: US added 58 GWh of new energy storage capacity in 2025
description: The U.S. energy storage industry installed a record 57.6 GWh of capacity in 2025, according to the Solar Energy Industries Association.
content: The U.S. energy storage industry installed a record 57.6 GWh of capacity in 2025, according to the Solar Energy Industries Association.
